parameters.functionCode:
const report = items[0].json; const p = report.report_period; const a = report.alert_stats; const c = report.case_stats; const k = report.kpis; const slackMessage = [ `*========================================*`, `*COBALTO WEEKLY MDR REPORT*`, `*Period: ${p.start} to ${p.end}*`, `*========================================*`, ``, `*ALERT OVERVIEW*`, `Total Alerts: *${a.total}*`, ` Critical: ${a.critical} | High: ${a.high} | Medium: ${a.medium} | Low: ${a.low}`, `Unique Agents: ${a.unique_agents} | Rules Triggered: ${a.unique_rules_triggered}`, ``, `*CASE MANAGEMENT*`, `Total Cases: *${c.total}*`, ` Open: ${c.open} | Resolved: ${c.resolved} | Closed: ${c.closed}`, ``, `*KEY PERFORMANCE INDICATORS*`, `MTTR: *${k.mttr_hours}h*`, `FP Rate: *${k.fp_rate_percent}%*`, `Alerts Triaged: *${k.alerts_triaged}*`, `Actions Taken: *${k.actions_taken}*`, `Est. False Positives: ${k.false_positive_estimate}`, ``, `*========================================*`, `Generated by Cobalto SOC Automation`, `========================================*` ].join('\n'); const emailSubject = `[Cobalto] Weekly MDR Report: ${p.start} to ${p.end}`; const emailHtml = [ '', '

Cobalto Weekly MDR Report

', `

Period: ${p.start} to ${p.end}

`, '
', '

Alert Overview

', ``, ``, ``, ``, ``, ``, ``, '
Total Alerts${a.total}
Critical${a.critical}
High${a.high}
Medium${a.medium}
Low${a.low}
Unique Agents${a.unique_agents}
', '

Case Management

', ``, ``, ``, ``, ``, '
Total Cases${c.total}
Open${c.open}
Resolved${c.resolved}
Closed${c.closed}
', '

Key Performance Indicators

', ``, ``, ``, ``, ``, '
MTTR${k.mttr_hours}h
FP Rate${k.fp_rate_percent}%
Alerts Triaged${k.alerts_triaged}
Actions Taken${k.actions_taken}
', '
', '

Generated by Cobalto SOC Automation

', '' ].join('\n'); return [{ json: { ...report, slack_message: slackMessage, email_subject: emailSubject, email_html: emailHtml } }];
